MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lauren Pebbles appeared via zoom for Thomas Tandy (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding notice to heirs, that there were no objections to the sale of the property, that there were no objections to Mr. Tandy living in the property with his mother, and that Ms. Peebles addressed all the examiners issues. The first and final account and report of executor is taken under submission.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via ZOOM, for Thomas Tandy, via ZOOM.

Ms. Peebles reports that she has a draft of a petition for final distribution and requests a continuance of 30 days to complete and file it. The court and counsel discuss regarding why Keith Tandy was not identified in petition. Mr. Tandy offers testimony and reports that Keith had passed away when his mother drafted her will so she did not include him in it. After additional discussion, Ms. Peebles advises that she intends to file a substitution of attorney in the related estate matter.

The Accounting Status Petition is taken off calendar. A new Status Hearing on Close of Estate is set for Apr-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept, 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Apr-11-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referee
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Kevin Buggy appeared by zoom for and with Thomas Tandy (Executor) by zoom.

The Court questions why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Mr. Buggy stated that he plans to file a petition for approval of a status report as soon as possible, that his predecessor only had hearing dates for one Client and this did not get calendared in the office, that when they started this the plan was for Mr. Tandy to purchase the property, that Mr. Tandy is unable to do so and the property needs to be sold, and that he is requesting that the petition for waiver of a probate referee be taken off calendar. The Petition for Waiver of Appraisal by Probate Referee and the orders to appear are off calendar. Status on close of estate is continued to March 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Buggy is to have his petition filed by March 17, 2021. If no petition is on file, Mr. Buggy will need to appear and explain why.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Continued To Feb-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Thomas C. Tandy and the Attorney Kevin Buggy to appear on February 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate and the order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Continued To Feb-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sil Liapes, Esq. for Thomas Tandy

This matter is on calendar for Petition for Approval to Acquire Reverse Mortgage on Property and Status Hearing on Close of Estate. The Court inquires if counsel is still pursuing the reverse mortgage petition. Counsel is not pursuing the petition because the case has changed in a big way. Counsel indicates that there is an additional family member, a brother, in which he was not aware of. The brother died in 2009 and had children. The petition of Mr. Tandy's other brother Carl Tandy, the other beneficiary under the will of Julia Tandy, is deceased. He died in April 2020. Counsel is probating Carl Tandy's estate as well. Even though this estate is going to be going to Carl's estate and Thomas, Thomas will not be able to keep the property. The property will have to be sold. Counsel will update this petition. The Court inquires if counsel is updating the petition or taking it off calendar. Counsel confirms that the Petition to Reverse Mortgage is now off calendar. That will be the order of the Court. The Court addresses the Status of Close. Counsel indicates that they will need to petition the Court to get the property sold first. The Court orders counsel to prepare a Petition on Report of Status of Administration. The Court continues the matter to February 2, 2021 at 9:00 am for Status Hearing on Close of the Estate with the expectation that will have a Petition on Report Status Administration on file by January 27, 2021. The Court advises counsel that he is waiting on an INA. The Court orders that the February 2nd Petition to Waive the Probate Referee. Counsel states that the INA was filed with the Petition to Waive the Probate Referee. The Court confirms that the Petition will need to be amended. This Court also sets a status for supplemental INA or INA for February 2nd. Counsel to confirm if something is on file and that appraisal of the property is in process. Court stands adjourned.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Jones, Deputy: N. Ng. Matter Not reported.
